options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: traverse_mode
options.description:
Choose how you want to Traverse the World
Normal: no changes to the game
Random Transition: Map transition like Morose -> Forest are randomized
Random Teleporter: No Map transition and only through Teleport possible

options.name: open_morose
options.description: Depricated Option

options.name: randomize_knife
options.description: If set to false, you receive the Knife as Starting Item

options.name: randomize_orb
options.description: If set to false, you receive the Orb as Starting item

options.name: randomize_item_upgrade
options.description:
If set to true, all Item upgrades in the Crafting Menu have random new Item
and the Item upgrades are in a different Location i.e. on the overworld.

options.name: randomize_money
options.description: Randomize each Money Block

options.name: randomize_mananite
options.description: Randomize each Source of Mananite Shards

options.name: randomize_magitite
options.description: Randomize each Source of Magitite Shards

options.name: chaos_mode
options.description:
Item Chaos rerolls every non Progressive Item into a new Item.
The new Item can be any type of Item as long as it can be stacked,
this include even Item like High Jump.

options.name: celia_sable
options.description:
If this flag is true, Celia and Sable are already unlocked
Also enables ChargeShot with only level 1 Orbitar

options.name: traps_percent
options.description:
Sets the percent amount of filler / useful items that are replaced by Traps.
When played without randomized money a value around 25% is recommended.

options.name: goal_type
options.description: Determines the requirement type to fight the Final Boss

options.name: magitite_amount
options.description: Sets the amount of findable yellow shards when they are randomized

options.name: mananite_amount
options.description: Sets the amount of findable purple shards when they are randomized

options.name: gear_count
options.description: The Amount of Gears found in the Game

options.name: goal_count
options.description:
The Amount of Gears required to Finish the Game
If this Number is greater than Gear count,
it is reduced to the Number of Gear count

options.name: walljumpTricks
options.description:
Using Items to manipulate Movementspeed,
for the Rabbit variants 200% Item use speed is required

options.name: backflip
options.description: Backflip enables a early mini double jump

options.name: cKick
options.description: Use a dropkick against a ceiling to reverse movement Direction

options.name: hiddenP
options.description: Consider Hidden Paths in Free Roam for the logic

options.name: earlydream
options.description: Skip Dreamkeeper wind with Dropkicks and Strong Air Up

options.name: barrierSkip
options.description: Skip Cutscene Barriers with Airdash (easy) or Slide (hard) and requires 60 fps lock

options.name: adcKick
options.description:
Enter Gallery of Souls with a a precise Airdash into Walljump from Ceiling pixel 
(very hard)

options.name: superBosses
options.description: Consider Tevi's Hidden Bosses in Library for the Logic

options.name: excludeMemine
options.description: No progression items in Memine races

options.name: excludeCrafting
options.description: No progression items in Crafting

options.name: excludeShop
options.description: No progression items in Shops

options.name: excludeUpgradeCraft
options.description: No progression items in Item upgrades crafts

options.name: excludeArcade
options.description: No progression items in Arcade

options.name: excludeTraps
options.description:
Removes traps from pool
The currently available traps are:
- "Reverse Camera","Double Time","Debuff","Yeet",
- "Taunt","Reduce Jump Height","Translucent Bunny Potion"

options.name: popupAll
options.description: Receiving an item triggers a Popup

options.name: popupProgression
options.description: Receiving a progression item triggers a Popup

options.name: popupBadge
options.description: Receiving a badge triggers a Popup

options.name: alphaFeature1
options.description: Does nothing

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
